FAIR PLAY!


1t is a jewel. 1t is the HONOR of a newspaper
Too often it is twisted contorted flung into strange
shapes, hammered into


"FOUL PLAY!''


For two days the Spokesman Review has used up valu
able space in screaming its claim to be called "Fair''
But the Spokesman Review is-Unfar


1t is not only 'unfair' in its editorial claims and utter
ances. 1t is unfair from labor's point of view


dlstorts mutiates refuses to print statements which
are not strictly in accord with it's efforts to fool the people
1t fights, seeks to destroy, sabs union labor by word
and by deed.


1t hires nonunion wherever it can crowd in
t'scab'


1t loses opportunity misrepresent men who refuse
to submit to its dictation.


1t is not only unfar-t is


DISHONEST!


Sunday morning the Spokesman Review revealed it's
dishonesty 1t declared that it had time declined to
open It's columns to statements the candidates desired
to make.


GREAT, BIG LIE!


That lie printed to counteract the effects of the ex
pose of its narrowness its meanness its reputation Of
signed contract for advertising which showed up the
crooked deal between it and Lilienthal.


This morning the Spokesman Review took pains to de
clare in black type its first page that it indie
pendent republican newspaper.


ANOTHER LIE!


The Spokesman-Review has never been republican, or
democratic, popuist prohbitionist, or socialist
1t has just been for the tall tower Nothing else.
A candidate, to the support of the Spokesman
Review must pledge himself to carry out the deals backed
by the tall tower owner, REGARDLESS OF RIGHT OR
WRONG.


candidate who goes to the Spokesman Review for
support is not asked what party what principles he will
support
He is asked if


HE WILL SUPPORT THE SCHEMES OF THE
SPOKESMAN-REVIEW


Once that pledge is made the Spokesman Review
undertakes to beoo the people by declaring for the
date regardless of party platform.


This is the reason why every supported by the
Spokesman-Review is SURE TO BE DEFEATED.
The Spokesman Review never does


PLAY FAIR.


1t is because of this knowledge of the slipper methods
of the seeking Spokesman Review which to label
every candidate its slave, that


ACUTE WILL BE DEFEATED.
